for (pkg in required_packages) {
  if (!pkg %in% installed) {
    message("Installing package: ", pkg)
    install.packages(pkg, dependencies = TRUE)
  }
  suppressPackageStartupMessages(
  library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
  )
}

# CondenScreen GUI 
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Function to generate well coordinates
generate_well_coordinates <- function(rows, cols) {
  expand.grid(Row = LETTERS[1:rows], Col = 1:cols) %>%
    mutate(
      Col = as.integer(Col),
      Well = paste0(Row, sprintf("%02d", Col)),
      Condition = "None"
    )
}

# ---------------------------
# UI
# ---------------------------
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("CondenScreen Well Selection:"),
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      selectInput(
        "plate_type", "Select Plate Type:",
        choices = c(
          "6-well"   = "2x3",
          "12-well"  = "3x4",
          "24-well"  = "4x6",
          "96-well"  = "8x12",
          "384-well" = "16x24"
        )
      ),

      radioButtons(
        "condition", "Select Condition:",
        choices = c("Positive Control", "Negative Control", "Test Condition", "Unselect")
      ),

      textInput("pos_control_name", "Positive Control Name:", value = "Positive Ctrl"),
      textInput("neg_control_name", "Negative Control Name:", value = "Negative Ctrl"),

      # NEW: Chemical vs Genetic screen toggle (button)
      actionButton("screen_toggle", "Screen: Chemical", style = "width: 100%"),

      # Existing: signal toggle
      actionButton("signal_toggle", "Signal: OFF", style = "width: 100%"),

      actionButton("clear", "Clear Selections"),
      hr(),

      strong("Save Directory:"),
      div(
        style = "display: flex; margin-bottom: 10px;",
        textInput("save_dir", NULL, value = paste0(getwd(), "/"), width = "100%")
      ),

      textInput(
        "save_filename",
        "Save File Name: (end with .csv; Final analysis will be in YOURFILENAME_results.csv)",
        value = "well_selection.csv"
      ),

      strong("Input Directory:"),
      div(
        style = "display: flex; margin-bottom: 10px;",
        textInput("input_dir", NULL, value = paste0(getwd(), "/"), width = "100%"),
        actionButton("parent_input_dir", "↑", style = "margin-left: 5px;"),
        actionButton("reset_input_dir", "Reset", style = "margin-left: 5px;")
      ),

      hr(),
      downloadButton("download", "Download Selection"),
      actionButton("exit_app", "Exit", class = "btn-danger", style = "width: 100%;")
    ),

    mainPanel(
      plotlyOutput("plate_plot"),
      tableOutput("selected_wells")
    )
  )
)

# ---------------------------
# SERVER
# ---------------------------
server <- function(input, output, session) {

  # Reactive values for directories (metadata)
  save_dir <- reactiveVal(getwd())
  input_dir <- reactiveVal(file.path(getwd(), "data"))

  observeEvent(input$save_dir, {
    if (dir.exists(input$save_dir)) save_dir(input$save_dir)
  })

  observeEvent(input$input_dir, {
    if (dir.exists(input$input_dir)) input_dir(input$input_dir)
  })

  observeEvent(input$parent_input_dir, {
    current <- input_dir()
    parent <- dirname(current)
    input_dir(parent)
    updateTextInput(session, "input_dir", value = parent)
  })

  observeEvent(input$reset_input_dir, {
    default <- file.path(getwd(), "data")
    input_dir(default)
    updateTextInput(session, "input_dir", value = default)
  })

  # Plate dimensions
  plate_dims <- reactive({
    dims <- strsplit(input$plate_type, "x")[[1]]
    list(rows = as.integer(dims[1]), cols = as.integer(dims[2]))
  })

  # Main data store
  well_data <- reactiveVal(data.frame(Row = character(), Col = integer(), Well = character(), Condition = character()))

  # Initialize / regenerate on plate type changes
  observeEvent(input$plate_type, {
    dims <- plate_dims()
    df <- generate_well_coordinates(dims$rows, dims$cols)
    well_data(df)
  }, ignoreInit = TRUE)

  observe({
    if (nrow(well_data()) == 0) {
      dims <- plate_dims()
      df <- generate_well_coordinates(dims$rows, dims$cols)
      well_data(df)
    }
  })

  # Chemical vs Genetic toggle
  screen_type <- reactiveVal("Chemical")
  observeEvent(input$screen_toggle, {
    screen_type(ifelse(screen_type() == "Chemical", "Genetic", "Chemical"))
    updateActionButton(session, "screen_toggle", label = paste0("Screen: ", screen_type()))
  })

  # Signal toggle
  signal_status <- reactiveVal(FALSE)
  observeEvent(input$signal_toggle, {
    signal_status(!signal_status())
    updateActionButton(session, "signal_toggle",
                       label = ifelse(signal_status(), "Signal: ON", "Signal: OFF"))
  })

  # Map UI condition to internal label
  normalize_condition <- function(cond) {
    if (identical(cond, "Unselect")) return("None")
    cond
  }

  # Plot
  output$plate_plot <- renderPlotly({
    df <- well_data()

    plot_ly(
      df,
      x = ~factor(Col, levels = sort(unique(Col))),
      y = ~factor(Row, levels = rev(unique(Row))),
      type = "scatter",
      mode = "markers",
      key = ~Well,  # <<< CRITICAL: stable identity so click/select never maps to wrong well
      marker = list(
        size = 15,
        color = ~case_when(
          Condition == "Positive Control" ~ "green",
          Condition == "Negative Control" ~ "red",
          Condition == "Test Condition" ~ "black",
          TRUE ~ "gray"
        )
      ),
      source = "plateplot"
    ) %>%
      layout(
        xaxis = list(title = "Column"),
        yaxis = list(title = "Row"),
        showlegend = FALSE,
        dragmode = "select"
      )
  })

  # Box select: use key (Well) not x/y
  observeEvent(event_data("plotly_selected", source = "plateplot"), {
    selected_data <- event_data("plotly_selected", source = "plateplot")
    if (is.null(selected_data) || is.null(selected_data$key)) return()

    df <- well_data()
    new_cond <- normalize_condition(input$condition)
    wells_clicked <- as.character(selected_data$key)

    df$Condition[df$Well %in% wells_clicked] <- new_cond
    well_data(df)
  })

  # Click select: use key (Well) not x/y
  observeEvent(event_data("plotly_click", source = "plateplot"), {
    click_data <- event_data("plotly_click", source = "plateplot")
    if (is.null(click_data) || is.null(click_data$key)) return()

    df <- well_data()
    new_cond <- normalize_condition(input$condition)
    well_clicked <- as.character(click_data$key)

    df$Condition[df$Well == well_clicked] <- new_cond
    well_data(df)
  })

  # Table (with renamed controls)
  output$selected_wells <- renderTable({
    well_data() %>%
      mutate(Condition = case_when(
        Condition == "Positive Control" ~ input$pos_control_name,
        Condition == "Negative Control" ~ input$neg_control_name,
        Condition == "None" ~ NA_character_,
        TRUE ~ Condition
      ))
  })

  # Download: includes plate dims + screen type
  output$download <- downloadHandler(
    filename = function() input$save_filename,
    content = function(file) {

      df <- well_data() %>%
        mutate(Condition = case_when(
          Condition == "Positive Control" ~ input$pos_control_name,
          Condition == "Negative Control" ~ input$neg_control_name,
          Condition == "None" ~ NA_character_,
          TRUE ~ Condition
        ))

      dims <- plate_dims()

      settings_df <- data.frame(
        PlateType = input$plate_type,         # e.g. "16x24"
        PlateRows = dims$rows,
        PlateCols = dims$cols,
        PlateWells = dims$rows * dims$cols,

        ScreenType = screen_type(),           # "Chemical" / "Genetic"
        SaveDirectory = save_dir(),           # metadata
        InputDirectory = input_dir(),         # metadata
        SignalStatus = ifelse(signal_status(), "ON", "OFF"),
        PositiveControlName = input$pos_control_name,
        NegativeControlName = input$neg_control_name,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )

      final_df <- cbind(settings_df, df)

      # (Optional) create SaveDirectory on disk, but the browser download won't use it.
      target_dir <- save_dir()
      if (!dir.exists(target_dir)) dir.create(target_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

      write.csv(final_df, file, row.names = FALSE)
    }
  )

  # Clear selections
  observeEvent(input$clear, {
    df <- well_data()
    df$Condition <- "None"
    well_data(df)
  })

  # Exit button
  observeEvent(input$exit_app, {
    stopApp()
  })

  session$onSessionEnded(function() stopApp())
}

# Run app
shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)

fread("/Users/dylan/Downloads/chemdiver/CondenScreenCombined_CondenScreen_Batch_2.csv")
#EDIT: Add path to recently saved .csv file:
#############################################################  
#Make sure all pathways use foward slash (/)!
#save_Location <- "/home/userX/pathsource/"
save_Location <-"/Users/dylan/Downloads/chemdiver/"
file_Location<- save_Location
#############################################################

dfSelection <-  fread(paste0(save_Location, "well_selection.csv"))

#Add trailing slash, if necessary:
add_trailing_slash <- function(filePath) {
  # Replace backslashes and double slashes with forward slashes
  filePath <- gsub("\\\\+", "/", filePath)  # replaces \ and \\ with /
  filePath <- gsub("/+", "/", filePath)     # collapses multiple / into a single /

  # Ensure exactly one trailing slash
  filePath <- sub("/?$", "/", filePath)

  return(filePath)
}


image_Save_Location <- add_trailing_slash(dfSelection$SaveDirectory[1])
file_Location <- add_trailing_slash(dfSelection$InputDirectory[1])
assayType <- dfSelection$SignalStatus[1]
pos_Ctrl <- dfSelection$PositiveControlName[1]
neg_Ctrl <- dfSelection$NegativeControlName[1]

rows <- dfSelection$PlateRows[1]
cols <- dfSelection$PlateCols[1]
plateSize <- dfSelection$PlateWells[1]
ChemVGene <- dfSelection$ScreenType[1]

#Edit: Change string parsing to match the specific naming convention you used while naming the CellProfiler output
#UNLESS CHANGED FILENAME PATTERNS IN CELLPROFILER, LEAVE AS IS:
#Change recursive = TRUE to FALSE if you don't wish to search through all sub-directories of your current directory
#############################################################

#file_paths <- dir(file_Location, pattern = "*.FociQuant.*", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
file_paths <- list.files(file_Location, pattern="CondenScreenCombined", full.names=TRUE, recursive=TRUE, ignore.case=TRUE)

#############################################################

# Check if the file exists
path_to_batchScript <- paste0(file_Location, "process_batch.R")

if (file.exists(path_to_batchScript)) {
  cat("The batch script exists. Success!\n")
} else {
  cat("The batch script file does not exist. Try downloading directly into your selected file_Location \n")
}

# Save file paths to disk so each batch can access them
saveRDS(file_paths, file.path(file_Location, "file_paths.rds"))

batch_size <- 20
total_files <- length(file_paths)
stopifnot(total_files > 0)  # fail early instead of launching nothing

total_batches <- ceiling(total_files / batch_size)

script_path <- file.path(file_Location, "process_batch.R")
stopifnot(file.exists(script_path))

for (i in 1:total_batches) {
  start_idx <- (i - 1) * batch_size + 1
  end_idx   <- min(i * batch_size, total_files)

  cat("Launching batch", i, "of", total_batches, "\n")

res <- system2(
  command = "Rscript",
  args = c(
    shQuote(script_path),
    start_idx,
    end_idx,
    i,
    shQuote(file.path(file_Location, "file_paths.rds")),
    shQuote(file_Location)
  ),
  stdout = TRUE,
  stderr = TRUE
)

cat(paste(res, collapse="\n"))

  gc()
}
 
# After all batches are done, combine if needed
cat("All batches completed. Combining results...\n")

# List all batch files
batch_files <- list.files(file_Location, 
                         pattern = "^batch_\\d+\\.csv$",
                         full.names = TRUE)
# Combine all batches into a final result
combined_data <- rbindlist(lapply(batch_files, fread))
fwrite(combined_data, paste0(file_Location, "final_combined_result.csv"))

cat("Processing complete!\n")


#Note: Will create tdTomato and Area columns even if empty for consistent DataFrame formatting

combined_data <- rbindlist(lapply(batch_files, fread), fill = TRUE)

# --- Make tdTomato/Area optional but stable (always present, always numeric) ---
ensure_numeric <- function(DT, col) {
  if (!col %in% names(DT)) DT[, (col) := NA_real_]
  DT[, (col) := suppressWarnings(as.numeric(get(col)))]
  invisible(NULL)
}

ensure_numeric(combined_data, "Intensity_IntegratedIntensity_P2A_tdTomato")
ensure_numeric(combined_data, "AreaShape_Area_P2A_tdTomato")

has_td_int  <- "Intensity_IntegratedIntensity_P2A_tdTomato" %in% names(combined_data) &&
               any(!is.na(combined_data$Intensity_IntegratedIntensity_P2A_tdTomato))
has_td_area <- "AreaShape_Area_P2A_tdTomato_P2A_tdTomato" %in% names(combined_data) &&
               any(!is.na(combined_data$AreaShape_Area_P2A_tdTomato_P2A_tdTomato))

has_td <- has_td_int || has_td_area

# STRING EXTRACTION FOR WELL/PLATE NAMING CONVENTIONS 

# Vectorized version
extract_info_vectorized <- function(combinedDF) {
  
  # Define patterns
#================================================================
  pattern_filename <- "([A-Za-z0-9]+)_([A-Za-z0-9]+)_s(\\d+)_w\\d+"
  pattern_pathname <- "\\d{8}-([A-Za-z0-9]+)_Plate_\\d+"
#================================================================
  # Extract all matches at once using vectorized operations
  matches <- str_match(combinedDF$FileName_GFP, pattern_filename)
  
  # Initialize result tibble with extracted values
  result <- tibble(
    plate_Num = matches[, 2],
    Well_Num = matches[, 3],
    Image_Num = matches[, 4]
  )
  
  return(result)
}


# Apply the vectorized function directly to the dataframe
extractedInfo <- extract_info_vectorized(combined_data)

combined_data[, c("plate_Num", "Well_Num", "Imagecopy_Num") := extractedInfo]

combined_Df <- combined_data

# INDIVIDUAL CONDITION/CONTROL STATISTICS 
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#[OPTIONAL] Filter out bottom 75% (to control for a transfection efficiency of 1:4)
#Filter conditions that leave < 5 cells/image (too much variance for meaningful interpretation)
combined_Df <- combined_Df %>%
  
  group_by(plate_Num, Well_Num, ImageNumber) %>%
  
  arrange(Children_GFP_foci_Count, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  
  #---------------------------------------
  #COMMENT OUT UNLESS YOU WANT TO TAKE ONLY THE TOP 25% OF CELLS TO ACCOUNT FOR TRANSFECTION EFFICIENCY!!!
  # mutate(nlen = ceiling(n() * 0.75)) %>%
  # filter(row_number() > nlen) %>%
  #--------------------------------------

  filter(n() > 5) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(plate_Num, Well_Num, Imagecopy_Num) %>%
  
  mutate(
    Nuclei_Number = n(),
    mean_Nuc_Foci = mean(Children_GFP_foci_Count, na.rm = TRUE)
    
  ) %>%
  
  ungroup()

#Combine with assigned conditions:
dfSelection <- dfSelection %>% rename(Well_Num = Well)
combined_Df <- merge(combined_Df, dfSelection[, c('SignalStatus', 'Condition', 'Well_Num')], by = "Well_Num")

combined_Df <- combined_Df %>% 
  mutate(Condition = ifelse(Condition == "Test Condition", Well_Num, Condition)) %>%
  filter(complete.cases(Condition))

#Calculate aggregate statistics for each condition:
combined_Df <- combined_Df %>%
  group_by(plate_Num, Well_Num) %>%
  
  # OPTIONAL [Filter out top image in case of screen aberration]
  #----------
  # mutate(
  #   n_images = n_distinct(ImageNumber),
  #   summary_condition = if_else(n_images >= 8 & mean_Nuc_Foci > 1, mean_Nuc_Foci < max(mean_Nuc_Foci), TRUE)
  # ) %>%
  #filter(summary_condition) %>%
  #----------

  summarise(
    Nuclei_Number = mean(Nuclei_Number, na.rm = TRUE),
    Nuclear_Area = mean(AreaShape_Area, na.rm = TRUE),
    FormFactor = mean(AreaShape_FormFactor, na.rm = TRUE),
    Avg_Foci      = mean(mean_Nuc_Foci, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    tdTomato_Area = if (has_td_area) mean(AreaShape_Area_P2A_tdTomato, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    tdTomato      = if (has_td_int)  mean(Intensity_IntegratedIntensity_P2A_tdTomato, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    
    AssayType  = unique(SignalStatus),
    Condition  = unique(Condition),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

#Determine control statistics:
pos_Ctrl_DF <- combined_Df %>%
  group_by(plate_Num) %>%
  filter(Condition == pos_Ctrl) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_Pos_SD   = sd(Avg_Foci, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_Pos_Foci = mean(Avg_Foci, na.rm=TRUE),
    cv_Pos        = cv(Avg_Foci) * 100,

    tdTomato_Pos_Area      = if (has_td_area) mean(tdTomato_Area, na.rm=TRUE) else NA_real_,
    Nuclear_Pos_TdTomato   = if (has_td_int)  mean(tdTomato, na.rm=TRUE)      else NA_real_,
    .groups = "drop"
  )


neg_Ctrl_DF <- combined_Df %>%
  group_by(plate_Num) %>%
  filter(Condition == neg_Ctrl) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_Neg_SD   = sd(Avg_Foci, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_Neg_Foci = mean(Avg_Foci, na.rm = TRUE),
    cv_Neg        = cv(Avg_Foci) * 100,

    tdTomato_Neg_Area    = if (has_td_area) mean(tdTomato_Area, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    Nuclear_Neg_TdTomato = if (has_td_int)  mean(tdTomato, na.rm = TRUE)      else NA_real_,

    .groups = "drop"
  )

plate_Summary <- merge(pos_Ctrl_DF, neg_Ctrl_DF)

plate_Summary <- plate_Summary %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    ZPrime_Score = round(
      1 - (3 * (.data$mean_Pos_SD + .data$mean_Neg_SD) /
             abs(.data$mean_Pos_Foci - .data$mean_Neg_Foci)),
      2
    )
  )

SB_Plate <- plate_Summary %>% group_by(plate_Num) %>%
  mutate(
    SB_Plate = ifelse(
      unique(assayType) == "OFF", 
      mean_Neg_Foci / mean_Pos_Foci, 
      mean_Pos_Foci / mean_Neg_Foci
    )
  )


#EXPORT PLATE SUMMARY:
# plate_Summary$ZPrime_Score <- ZPrime_Score[[1]]
plate_Summary$SB_Plate <- SB_Plate$SB_Plate

p_ctrls <- combined_Df %>% filter( Condition == pos_Ctrl) %>%
  group_by(plate_Num) %>%
     summarise(Control = paste0(pos_Ctrl), across(c( Nuclei_Number, Avg_Foci, tdTomato), mean, na.rm = TRUE), Condition = pos_Ctrl)


n_ctrls <- combined_Df %>% filter( Condition == neg_Ctrl) %>% 
  group_by(plate_Num) %>%
     summarise(Control = paste0(neg_Ctrl), across(c(Nuclei_Number, Avg_Foci, tdTomato), mean, na.rm = TRUE), Condition = neg_Ctrl)

#Export controls summary:
ctrls <- rbind(p_ctrls, n_ctrls)

#Combined main dataframe: 
combined_Df <- merge(combined_Df, plate_Summary[, c("plate_Num", "ZPrime_Score")], by = "plate_Num" )


  
# NORMALIZED EFFECTS & CYTOTOXICITY AND MORPHOLOGY ANALYSIS
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

#Creates a temp dataframe to not write over original
 temp_stats_Df<- combined_Df %>%
  # Remove controls
  filter(Condition == Well_Num) %>%
  
  # Group by plate number
  group_by(plate_Num) %>%
  
  # Calculate percent change relative to plate
  mutate(
    PercentEffect = ifelse(
      `AssayType` == "OFF",
      ((mean(Avg_Foci) - Avg_Foci) / mean(Avg_Foci)) * 100,
      ((Avg_Foci - mean(Avg_Foci)) / mean(Avg_Foci)) * 100
    ),
    
    # Calculate the mean and standard deviation of each plate (based on PercentEffect)
    mean_percentEffect = mean(PercentEffect),
    SD_percentEffect = sd(PercentEffect),
  
    # Calculate Z-scores for test conditions specific to each plate
    ZScore = (PercentEffect - mean_percentEffect) / SD_percentEffect,
  
    # Calculate normalized differences for nuclear area, form factor, and cell count
    NuclearAreaDiff = (Nuclear_Area - mean(Nuclear_Area)) / mean(Nuclear_Area) * 100,
    FormFactorDiff = (FormFactor - mean(FormFactor)) / mean(FormFactor) * 100,
    tdTomato_Diff = (tdTomato - mean(tdTomato)) / mean(tdTomato) * 100,
    CellCountDiff = (Nuclei_Number - mean(Nuclei_Number)) / mean(Nuclei_Number) * 100
    )

#Remove any duplicated columns up till now 

#OPTIONAL -- Can have a more detailed view on cytotoxicity based on cell count and nuclear health:
#Ceullular Health Function (as function of cell density, nuclear area, and nuclear formfactor/morphological differences)
temp_stats_Df <- temp_stats_Df %>%
  group_by(plate_Num, Well_Num) %>%
  mutate(Viability =
    CellCountDiff + ((100 + CellCountDiff) / 100) * ((NuclearAreaDiff + FormFactorDiff) / 2)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

#Else:
# temp_stats_Df <- temp_stats_Df %>%
#   group_by(plate_Num, Well_Num) %>%
#   mutate(Viability =
#     CellCountDiff) %>%
#   ungroup()

temp_stats_Df %>% arrange(desc(NuclearAreaDiff))

temp_stats_Df[order(temp_stats_Df$PercentEffect, decreasing = TRUE),] 

colnames(temp_stats_Df)
if ("tdTomato_Diff" %in% names(temp_stats_Df)) {
  
  
  # --- Create output directory FIRST ---
  out_dir <- paste0(save_Location, "residuals/")
  dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  # --- Classify wells ---
  tdTomato_Df <- temp_stats_Df %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      tdTomato_outlier = abs(tdTomato_Diff) > 50,
      hit_class = case_when(
        tdTomato_outlier                               ~ "tdTomato outlier",
        PercentEffect > 20 & tdTomato_Diff > -10      ~ "Confirmed hit",
        PercentEffect > 20 & tdTomato_Diff <= -10     ~ "Suspect — co-suppressed",
        PercentEffect <= 20 & tdTomato_Diff <= -10    ~ "tdTomato suppressed only",
        TRUE                                           ~ "Inactive"
      ),
      hit_class = factor(hit_class, levels = c(
        "Confirmed hit", "Suspect — co-suppressed",
        "tdTomato suppressed only", "Inactive", "tdTomato outlier"
      ))
    )
  
  # --- Color palette ---
  hit_colors <- c(
    "Confirmed hit"            = "steelblue",
    "Suspect — co-suppressed"  = "tomato",
    "tdTomato suppressed only" = "goldenrod",
    "Inactive"                 = "gray70",
    "tdTomato outlier"         = "black"
  )
  
  # --- P1: PercentEffect quadrant ---
  y_max <- max(tdTomato_Df$PercentEffect, na.rm = TRUE)
  y_min <- min(tdTomato_Df$PercentEffect, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  p1 <- ggplot(tdTomato_Df, aes(x = tdTomato_Diff, y = PercentEffect, color = hit_class)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = hit_colors) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-50, 50), ylim = c(y_min, y_max)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 20,  linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = -10, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
    annotate("text", x = -49, y = y_max * 0.95,
             label = "Suspect / co-suppressed", color = "tomato",    size = 3, hjust = 0) +
    annotate("text", x = -5,  y = y_max * 0.95,
             label = "Confirmed hits",          color = "steelblue", size = 3, hjust = 0) +
    labs(
      x     = "tdTomato % Diff (negative = non-specific suppression)",
      y     = "MLF2-GFP % Effect (positive = fewer foci)",
      color = "Hit class",
      title = "Quadrant: PercentEffect vs. tdTomato"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.text     = element_text(size = 9),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm")
    )
  
  # --- Residual model ---
  suspects <- tdTomato_Df %>%
    filter(hit_class == "Suspect — co-suppressed") %>%
    ungroup()
  
  suspect_model <- lm(PercentEffect ~ tdTomato_Diff, data = suspects)
  model_summary <- summary(suspect_model)
  
  residual_threshold <- median(suspects$residual, na.rm = TRUE) + 
                        1.5 * mad(suspects$residual,  na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # --- Mutate residuals BEFORE sink ---
  suspects <- suspects %>%
    mutate(
      fitted        = fitted(suspect_model),
      residual      = residuals(suspect_model),
      residual_rank = rank(-residual),
      residual_hit  = residual >= 20
    )
  
  # --- Save model summary (now has residual info) ---
  sink(file.path(out_dir, "suspect_model_summary.txt"))
  cat("=== Suspect Cluster Regression Model ===\n\n")
  cat("Formula: PercentEffect ~ tdTomato_Diff\n")
  cat("Subset: hit_class == 'Suspect — co-suppressed'\n\n")
  print(model_summary)
  cat("\n=== Model Performance ===\n")
  cat("R-squared:         ", round(model_summary$r.squared,     3), "\n")
  cat("Adjusted R-squared:", round(model_summary$adj.r.squared, 3), "\n")
  cat("Residual Std Error:", round(model_summary$sigma,         3), "\n")
  cat("\n=== Residual Threshold ===\n")
  cat("Method: residual >= 20\n")
  cat("Rescued hits:", sum(suspects$residual_hit), "\n")
  cat("Total suspects:", nrow(suspects), "\n")
  sink()
  
  # --- P2: Residual rescue plot ---
  p2 <- ggplot(suspects, aes(x = tdTomato_Diff, y = PercentEffect)) +
    geom_segment(aes(xend = tdTomato_Diff, yend = fitted),
                 color = "gray60", alpha = 0.4, linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_point(aes(color = residual_hit), size = 2.5, alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "gray30", se = TRUE, linetype = "dashed") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "tomato", "TRUE" = "steelblue"),
                       labels = c("FALSE" = "Suspect", "TRUE" = "Residual-rescued")) +
    labs(
      x        = "tdTomato % Diff",
      y        = "MLF2-GFP % Effect",
      color    = NULL,
      title    = "Residual rescue within suspect cluster",
      subtitle = paste0("R² = ",    round(model_summary$r.squared, 2),
                        "  |  Adj R² = ", round(model_summary$adj.r.squared, 2),
                        "  |  slope = ", round(coef(suspect_model)[2], 2),
                        "  |  n = ",    nrow(suspects))
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  # --- Combined layout ---
  combined <- p1 / p2
  print(combined)
  
  # --- Save figures ---
  ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "p1_percenteffect_quadrant.png"), p1,       width = 10, height = 7,  dpi = 300)
  ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "p2_residual_rescue.png"),        p2,       width = 10, height = 7,  dpi = 300)
  ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "residual_plots.png"),            combined, width = 10, height = 14, dpi = 300)
  
  # --- Join residuals back to main df ---
  cols_to_remove <- c("tdTomato_outlier", "hit_class", "fitted", 
                      "residual_hit", "residual_rank", "GFP_residual", "hit_candidate")
  
  suspects2 <- suspects[suspects$residual >= 20, 
                        !names(suspects) %in% cols_to_remove]
  
  temp_stats_Df <- temp_stats_Df %>%
    left_join(suspects2 %>% select(plate_Num, Well_Num, residual),
              by = c("plate_Num", "Well_Num"))
  
  # --- Save Excel ---
  wb <- createWorkbook()
  addWorksheet(wb, "All Wells")
  writeData(wb, "All Wells", tdTomato_Df)
  addWorksheet(wb, "Confirmed Hits")
  writeData(wb, "Confirmed Hits", tdTomato_Df %>% 
              filter(hit_class == "Confirmed hit") %>% 
              arrange(desc(PercentEffect)))
  addWorksheet(wb, "Residual Rescued")
  writeData(wb, "Residual Rescued", suspects %>% 
              filter(residual_hit) %>% 
              arrange(desc(residual)))
  addWorksheet(wb, "Suspects")
  writeData(wb, "Suspects", suspects %>% arrange(desc(residual)))
  saveWorkbook(wb, file.path(out_dir, "residual_analysis.xlsx"), overwrite = TRUE)
  
  cat("Residual analysis complete. Outputs saved to:", out_dir, "\n")
}

# B-SCORE CALCULATION (CONTROLS FOR POSITIONAL EFFECTS) 
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

BScore_func <- function(df, rows, cols,
                        effect_col = "PercentEffect",
                        well_col   = "Well_Num") {

  temp_df <- df

  # Full plate indexing
  row_levels <- LETTERS[1:rows]
  col_levels <- 1:cols

  # Parse wells like A01, B12, etc.
  well <- as.character(temp_df[[well_col]])
  r <- substr(well, 1, 1)
  cnum <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(sub("^[A-Za-z]+", "", well)))

  keep <- !is.na(r) & !is.na(cnum) & r %in% row_levels & cnum %in% col_levels
  if (!any(keep)) {
    return(dplyr::tibble(Well_Num = character(0), BScore = numeric(0), BZ_Score = numeric(0)))
  }

  # Build full plate matrix
  mtx <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = rows, ncol = cols,
                dimnames = list(row_levels, as.character(col_levels)))

  eff <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(temp_df[[effect_col]]))

  # Fill matrix (vectorized)
  mtx[cbind(match(r[keep], row_levels), match(cnum[keep], col_levels))] <- eff[keep]

  # Median polish + MAD scaling (B-score)
  bmat <- tryCatch({
    mp <- stats::medpolish(mtx, trace.iter = FALSE)
    resid <- mp$residuals
    MAD <- stats::mad(resid, constant = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (is.na(MAD) || MAD == 0) MAD <- 1
    resid / MAD
  }, error = function(e) {
    # Fallback: impute missing with plate median and retry
    fill <- stats::median(mtx, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (is.na(fill)) fill <- 0
    mtx[is.na(mtx)] <- fill

    mp <- stats::medpolish(mtx, trace.iter = FALSE)
    resid <- mp$residuals
    MAD <- stats::mad(resid, constant = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (is.na(MAD) || MAD == 0) MAD <- 1
    resid / MAD
  })

  # Convert to tibble for wells present in this df
  out <- expand.grid(
    Row = row_levels,
    Col = col_levels,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  out$Well_Num <- paste0(out$Row, sprintf("%02d", out$Col))
  out$BScore   <- as.vector(bmat)

  out <- dplyr::as_tibble(out) %>%
    dplyr::filter(.data$Well_Num %in% unique(well[keep])) %>%
    dplyr::select(.data$Well_Num, .data$BScore)

  # BZ-score (within-plate normalization of B-score)
  mu <- mean(out$BScore, na.rm = TRUE)
  sdv <- stats::sd(out$BScore, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.na(sdv) || sdv == 0) sdv <- 1

  out <- out %>%
    dplyr::mutate(BZ_Score = (.data$BScore - mu) / sdv)

  out
}

# ---- RUN B-SCORE ONLY WHEN:
# (1) assayType == "OFF" AND (2) plateSize >= 96
# Should not use BZ-Score if plate size is smaller than 96 wells
if (assayType == "OFF" && plateSize >= 96) {

bs_res <- temp_stats_Df %>%
  filter(Condition == Well_Num) %>%
  group_by(plate_Num) %>%
  nest() %>%
  mutate(bscores = map(data, ~{
    out <- BScore_func(.x, rows = rows, cols = cols)
    out$plate_Num <- unique(.x$plate_Num)
    out
  })) %>%
  select(-data) %>%     # ← DROP IT HERE
  unnest(bscores)

  
  # Join back safely by plate + well (no row-order assumptions)
 temp_stats_Df <- temp_stats_Df %>%
  left_join(bs_res, by = c("plate_Num", "Well_Num")) %>%
  rename(BZScore = BZ_Score)

} else {
  # Explicitly create columns so downstream code doesn't break
  temp_stats_Df$BScore  <- NA_real_
  temp_stats_Df$BZScore <- NA_real_

  if (assayType == "OFF" && plateSize < 96) {
    message("Skipping B-score: plate size < 96 wells (medpolish is unstable with too few wells).")
  }
}
 
 

 
# EXPORT PLATE FIGURES (OPTIONAL, CAN COMMENT OUT) 
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Define path
sub_dir <- paste0(file_Location,"Plate_Figures/") 

# Create subdirectory
if (!dir.exists(sub_dir)) {
  dir.create(sub_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  print("Subdirectory created successfully!")
} else {
  print("Subdirectory already exists.")
}


for (plate in seq_len(length(unique(combined_Df$plate_Num)))){
  plate_List <- unique(combined_Df$plate_Num)
  sub_df <- subset(combined_Df, plate_Num == plate_List[plate])

   nuc_plate <- plate_plot(
    data = sub_df,
    position = Well_Num,
    value = Avg_Foci,
    plate_size = plateSize,
    label = round(Avg_Foci, 0),
    title = paste(plate_List[plate], ", Avg. Foci/Condition:", sep = ""),
    title_size = 14,
    label_size = 1.6,
    colour = c("#FF0000", "#006600", "#006600", "#00CC00", "#00FF00")
   
  )

    
    cell_plate <- plate_plot(
    data = sub_df,
    position = Well_Num,
    value = Nuclei_Number,
    plate_size = plateSize,
    # label = round(Nuclei_Number),
    title = paste(plate_List[plate], ", Avg. Cell Count/Condition:", sep = ""),
    title_size = 14,
    label_size = 1.6,
    colour = c("#FF0000", "#006600", "#006600", "#00CC00", "#00FF00")
  )
    
  plots <- list(nuc_plate, cell_plate)

if (has_td_int && "tdTomato" %in% names(sub_df) && any(!is.na(sub_df$tdTomato))) {
  tdTomato_plate <- plate_plot(
    data = sub_df,
    position = Well_Num,
    value = tdTomato,
    plate_size = plateSize,
    title = paste(plate_List[plate], ", Avg. TdTomato Intensity/Condition:", sep = ""),
    title_size = 14,
    label_size = 1.6,
    colour = c("#FF0000", "#006600", "#006600", "#00CC00", "#00FF00")
  )
  plots <- c(plots, list(tdTomato_plate))
}

combined_plot <- do.call(grid.arrange, c(plots, ncol = 1))
    

  ggsave(filename = paste0(sub_dir, paste(plate_List[plate], "WTScreen_Figure.png")), plot = combined_plot, width = 8, height = 8)

}

#For testing create backup
combined_Df_backup <- combined_Df
plate_Summary2_backup <- plate_Summary
# ORGANIZE AND EXPORT RANKED DATA
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
drop_all_na_cols <- function(df, cols) {
  cols_present <- intersect(cols, names(df))
  cols_drop <- cols_present[vapply(df[cols_present], function(x) all(is.na(x)), logical(1))]
  dplyr::select(df, -dplyr::any_of(cols_drop))
}

# ---- CONTROLS (optional tdTomato) ----
ctrl_cols <- c("Nuclei_Number", "Avg_Foci")
if (has_td_area) ctrl_cols <- c(ctrl_cols, "tdTomato_Area")
if (has_td_int)  ctrl_cols <- c(ctrl_cols, "tdTomato")

p_ctrls <- combined_Df %>%
  filter(Condition == pos_Ctrl) %>%
  group_by(plate_Num) %>%
  summarise(
    Control = pos_Ctrl,
    across(any_of(ctrl_cols), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

n_ctrls <- combined_Df %>%
  filter(Condition == neg_Ctrl) %>%
  group_by(plate_Num) %>%
  summarise(
    Control = neg_Ctrl,
    across(any_of(ctrl_cols), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ctrls <- bind_rows(p_ctrls, n_ctrls) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>%
  rename(
    Plate     = plate_Num,
    CellCount = Nuclei_Number,
    AvgFoci   = Avg_Foci
  )

if ("tdTomato_Area" %in% names(ctrls)) ctrls <- ctrls %>% rename(TdTomato_Area = tdTomato_Area)
if ("tdTomato"      %in% names(ctrls)) ctrls <- ctrls %>% rename(TdTomatoIntensity = tdTomato)

# ---- PLATE SUMMARY: round + rename (robust) + optional drops ----
plate_Summary <- plate_Summary %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>%
  rename(
    Plate                 = any_of("plate_Num"),
    STDPosCtrl            = any_of("mean_Pos_SD"),
    AvgFociPosCtrl        = any_of("mean_Pos_Foci"),
    CVPosCtrl             = any_of("cv_Pos"),
    Pos_TdTomatoArea      = any_of("tdTomato_Pos_Area"),
    Pos_TdTomatoIntensity = any_of("Nuclear_Pos_TdTomato"),
    STDNegCtrl            = any_of("mean_Neg_SD"),
    AvgFociNegCtrl        = any_of("mean_Neg_Foci"),
    CVNegCtrl             = any_of("cv_Neg"),
    Neg_TdTomatoArea      = any_of("tdTomato_Neg_Area"),
    Neg_TdTomatoIntensity = any_of("Nuclear_Neg_TdTomato"),
    PlateZScore           = any_of("ZPrime_Score"),
    SB                    = any_of("SB_Plate")
  )

# Your prior behavior: always remove area cols
plate_Summary <- plate_Summary %>% select(-any_of(c("Pos_TdTomatoArea", "Neg_TdTomatoArea")))

# If intensity wasn't present, remove those too
if (!has_td_int) {
  plate_Summary <- plate_Summary %>% select(-any_of(c("Pos_TdTomatoIntensity", "Neg_TdTomatoIntensity")))
}

# ---- FINAL RANKED OUTPUT (optional tdTomato) ----
combined_Df_out <- temp_stats_Df %>% filter(Condition == Well_Num)

base_off <- c("BZScore", "Viability", "plate_Num", "Well_Num", "ZPrime_Score",
              "PercentEffect", "Avg_Foci", "CellCountDiff", "Nuclei_Number",
              "ZScore", "BScore", "AssayType")

base_on  <- c("ZScore", "Viability", "plate_Num", "Well_Num", "ZPrime_Score",
              "PercentEffect", "Avg_Foci", "CellCountDiff", "Nuclei_Number",
              "AssayType")

td_cols <- character(0)
if (has_td_area) td_cols <- c(td_cols, "tdTomato_Area")
if (has_td_int)  td_cols <- c(td_cols, "tdTomato", "tdTomato_Diff")
if ("residual" %in% names(temp_stats_Df)) td_cols <- c(td_cols, "residual")  

if (assayType == "OFF") {
  keep_cols <- intersect(c(base_off, td_cols), names(combined_Df_out))

  combined_Df_out <- combined_Df_out %>%
    select(all_of(keep_cols)) %>%
    rename(
      Plate                = any_of("plate_Num"),
      Well                 = any_of("Well_Num"),
      PlateZPrimeScore     = any_of("ZPrime_Score"),
      PercentEffect        = any_of("PercentEffect"),
      AvgFoci              = any_of("Avg_Foci"),
      CellCountPercentDiff = any_of("CellCountDiff"),
      CellCount            = any_of("Nuclei_Number")
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(BZScore)) %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2)))

} else {
  keep_cols <- intersect(c(base_on, td_cols), names(combined_Df_out))

  combined_Df_out <- combined_Df_out %>%
    select(all_of(keep_cols)) %>%
    rename(
      Plate                = any_of("plate_Num"),
      Well                 = any_of("Well_Num"),
      PlateZPrimeScore     = any_of("ZPrime_Score"),
      PercentEffect        = any_of("PercentEffect"),
      AvgFoci              = any_of("Avg_Foci"),
      CellCountPercentDiff = any_of("CellCountDiff"),
      CellCount            = any_of("Nuclei_Number")
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(ZScore)) %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2)))
}



#Reorder:
if (assayType == "OFF") {
combined_Df_out <- combined_Df_out %>% arrange(desc(BZScore))
 } else {
combined_Df_out <- combined_Df_out %>% arrange(desc(ZScore))
 }  

if (assayType == "OFF"){
  hits_df <- combined_Df_out %>% filter(BZScore >= 3)
} else {
  hits_df <- combined_Df_out %>% filter(ZScore >= 3)
}

    

# ---- DROP tdTomato columns if they are entirely NA ----
td_cols_all <- c(
  "tdTomato_Area", "tdTomato", "tdTomato_Diff",
  "TdTomato_Area", "TdTomatoIntensity",
  "Pos_TdTomatoArea", "Neg_TdTomatoArea",
  "Pos_TdTomatoIntensity", "Neg_TdTomatoIntensity", "residual"
)

combined_Df_out <- drop_all_na_cols(combined_Df_out, td_cols_all)
ctrls           <- drop_all_na_cols(ctrls, td_cols_all)
plate_Summary   <- drop_all_na_cols(plate_Summary, td_cols_all)

# ---- EXPORT ----
export_File <- file.path(file_Location, "CondenScreenV2.xlsx")
wb <- createWorkbook()
addWorksheet(wb, "Combined Analysis")
addWorksheet(wb, "Hits")
addWorksheet(wb, "Plate Statistics")
addWorksheet(wb, "Controls")

# IMPORTANT FIX: write combined_Df_out (not combined_Df)
writeData(wb, "Combined Analysis", combined_Df_out, startCol = 1, startRow = 1, colNames = TRUE)

writeData(wb, sheet = "Hits", x = hits_df, startCol = 1,  startRow = 1, colNames = TRUE)

writeData(wb, "Plate Statistics", plate_Summary, startCol = 1, startRow = 1, colNames = TRUE)
writeData(wb, "Controls", ctrls, startCol = 1, startRow = 1, colNames = TRUE)
 
freezePane(wb, sheet = "Combined Analysis", firstActiveRow = 2)
freezePane(wb, sheet = "Hits", firstActiveRow = 2)
freezePane(wb, "Plate Statistics", firstActiveRow = 2)
freezePane(wb, "Controls", firstActiveRow = 2)

saveWorkbook(wb, file = export_File, overwrite = TRUE)

# ------------- SETUP AND CONFIGURATION -------------
# Disable scientific notation for better readability
options(scipen = 999)

# ============================================================================
# CONDENSCREEN FIGURE GENERATION 
# ============================================================================

# ------------- DATA LOADING AND PREPARATION -------------
# Load workbook from predefined location (assuming save_Location is defined elsewhere)

wb <- loadWorkbook(export_File)

merged_df <- read.xlsx(wb, sheet = "Combined Analysis")

#Typically comment the following two lines out. Dataset Specific
#merged_df <- merged_df[merged_df$Plate != "A19946", ]
merged_df$Plate[merged_df$Plate == "READ"] <- "A19840"


# Convert numeric columns to proper type
merged_df$Average_foci_perCell <- as.numeric(merged_df$AvgFoci)
merged_df$Normalized_Effect <- as.numeric(merged_df$PercentEffect)
merged_df <- merged_df[!as.character(merged_df$Plate) %in% c("45", "46", "47"), ]
#EDIT: Change to location of a file linking compound/gene names to each well, if applicable, else comment out, and run the following 
#############################################################

template_location <- file.path(file_Location, "plateMap.xlsx")
template <- read.xlsx(template_location)

well_candidates <- c("Well", "Well_Condition")
ref_candidates  <- c("Reference", "Gene", "Compound")
cas_candidates  <- c("CAS", "CAS.Number")
smiles_candidates <- c("SMILES")

pick_first_existing <- function(df, candidates) {
  intersect(candidates, colnames(df))[1]
}

well_col   <- pick_first_existing(template, well_candidates)
ref_col    <- pick_first_existing(template, ref_candidates)
cas_col    <- pick_first_existing(template, cas_candidates)
smiles_col <- pick_first_existing(template, smiles_candidates)

select_cols <- c(
  intersect("Plate", colnames(template)),
  well_col,
  ref_col,
  cas_col,
  smiles_col
)

select_cols <- select_cols[!is.na(select_cols)]

template <- template %>%
  select(all_of(select_cols)) %>%
  rename(
    Well      = any_of(well_candidates),
    Reference = any_of(ref_candidates),
    CAS       = any_of(cas_candidates)
  )
# Merge data with compound names
 merged_df <- merge(merged_df, template, by = c("Plate", "Well"))

#############################################################
#If you do not have access to a file linking reference names to each well, uncomment and run below:

#merged_df$Reference <- merged_df$Well

#############################################################

#-------------------------CHANGE IF NECESSARY----------------------------
hits_of_interest <- c("PYRITHIONE ZINC", "CELASTROL", "PLUMBAGIN", "DISULFIRAM", "APOL3", "ZNF335", "RNF26", "RAN", "NUP
                       50", "EIF4A3", "TOR1A", "TOR1B")
microcephaly  <- c("ZNF335", "SIN3A", "SPDL1", "CDK5", "NCAPD3", "CIT", "SHH")
#------------------------------------------------------------------------

#############################################################

sheet_hits = "Hits"
sheet_df = "Combined Analysis"
merged_df <- merged_df[!is.na(merged_df$Reference), ]  # Keep only rows with reference names (compounds, genes, etc.)

# 1) Build hits_df2 (hits + QC columns)
hits_df <- if (assayType == "OFF") {
  merged_df %>% filter(BZScore >= 3)
} else {
  merged_df %>% filter(ZScore >= 3)
}

# (optional) make factors safe for Excel
hits_df <- hits_df %>% mutate(across(where(is.factor), as.character))
merged_df2 <- merged_df %>% mutate(across(where(is.factor), as.character))

# 2) Load the existing workbook and overwrite both sheets
wb <- loadWorkbook(export_File)

if (sheet_hits %in% names(wb)) removeWorksheet(wb, sheet_hits)
addWorksheet(wb, sheet_hits)
#Order by BZ-Score (descending)
hits_df <- hits_df %>% arrange(desc(if ("BZScore" %in% names(.)) BZScore else ZScore))

writeData(wb, sheet_hits, hits_df, startCol = 1, startRow = 1, colNames = TRUE)
freezePane(wb, sheet_hits, firstActiveRow = 2)
addFilter(wb, sheet_hits, rows = 1, cols = 1:ncol(hits_df))

if (sheet_df %in% names(wb)) removeWorksheet(wb, sheet_df)
addWorksheet(wb, sheet_df)

#Order by BZ-Score (descending)
merged_df2 <- merged_df2 %>% arrange(desc(if ("BZScore" %in% names(.)) BZScore else ZScore))
writeData(wb, sheet_df, merged_df2, startCol = 1, startRow = 1, colNames = TRUE)
freezePane(wb, sheet_df, firstActiveRow = 2)
addFilter(wb, sheet_df, rows = 1, cols = 1:ncol(merged_df2))

saveWorkbook(wb, export_File, overwrite = TRUE)
#NORMALIZED SCORE PLOT:
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
score_col <- if ("BZScore" %in% names(merged_df)) "BZScore" else "ZScore"

merged_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(
    score_value = .data[[score_col]],

    bz_hit  = score_value >= 3,

    td_ok   = if (has_td_int && "tdTomato_Diff" %in% names(.))
                tdTomato_Diff >= -25
              else TRUE,

    viab_ok = if ("Viability" %in% names(.))
                Viability >= -25
              else TRUE
  ) %>%
  select(-score_value)

plot_normalized_score <- function(df, assay_type, image_path) {

  score_col <- if (assay_type == "OFF") sym("BZScore") else sym("ZScore")
  label_y   <- if (assay_type == "OFF") "BZ-Score" else "Z-Score"

  y_limits <- c(-4, 8)
  y_breaks <- c(-4, -2, 0, 2, 4, 6, 8)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = paste0(Well, Plate), y = !!score_col)) +

    # ---- background points (BZ < 3)
    geom_point(
      data = dplyr::filter(df, !!score_col < 3),
      color = "black",
      size = 1,
      alpha = 0.4,
      position = position_jitter(width = 0.3, height = 0)
    ) +

    # ---- BZ >= 3 hits, colored by phenotype logic
geom_point(
  data = dplyr::filter(df, !!score_col >= 3),
  aes(
    color = Reference %in% hits_of_interest,
    size  = Reference %in% hits_of_interest
  ),
  alpha = 1
) +
scale_size_manual(values  = c("TRUE" = 2.6, "FALSE" = 2)) +
guides(color = "none", size = "none") +
  scale_color_manual(
  values = c(
    "TRUE"  = "red",
    "FALSE" = "black"
    )
  ) +

  #Optional: Change color based on effect
    # scale_color_manual(
    #   values = c(
    #     green      = "green",
    #     red        = "red",
    #     purple     = "purple",
    #     background = "black"
    #   )
    # ) +

    geom_hline(yintercept = 2, linetype = "dashed", size = 1.5) +

    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold")

    ) +

    labs(
  x = "Compound",
  y = label_y
    )+
    scale_y_continuous(limits = y_limits, breaks = y_breaks) +
    guides(color = "none") +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = y_limits) +
    geom_text_repel(
  data = dplyr::filter(df, !!score_col >= 3),
  aes(label = Reference),
  size = 4.5,
  fontface = "bold",
  box.padding = 0.4,
  point.padding = 0.3,
  max.overlaps = Inf
)

  ggsave(
    filename = paste0(image_path, "normalized_SigScoreTdTomatoScreen.pdf"),
    plot = p,
    dpi = 300,
    width = 10,
    height = 10
  )

  return(p)
}


plot_normalized_score(merged_df, assayType ,image_Save_Location)

#DISTRIBUTION PLOTS
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

#RAW DISTRIBUTION
# Create histogram of raw foci per cell
  raw_distribution <- ggplot(merged_df, aes(x = AvgFoci)) +
    geom_histogram(color = "black", fill = "darkgray", binwidth = 1) +
    geom_density(alpha = 0.6, fill = "darkgray") +
    labs(title = NULL, y = "Count", x = "MLF2-GFP Foci/Cell") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(title = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),
          axis.title.x = element_text(size = 36, face = "bold"),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold"),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold"),
          axis.ticks.length = unit(0.4, "cm"),
          axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1.2))
  

ggsave(paste(image_Save_Location, "TdTomatoScreenrawdistrpilot.pdf", sep = ""), 
        raw_distribution, 
        dpi = 300, 
        width = 10, 
        height = 10)
  

#NORMALIZED EFFECT DISTRIBUTION
  normalized_dist <- ggplot(merged_df, aes(x = PercentEffect)) +
    geom_histogram(color = "black", fill = "darkgray", binwidth = 4 ) +
    geom_density(alpha = 0.6, fill = "darkgray") +
    # Add reference lines and labels
    geom_vline(aes(xintercept = 100), linetype = 'dashed', size = 2.5) +
    geom_vline(aes(xintercept = 0), linetype = 'dashed', size = 2.5) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(title = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),
          axis.title.x = element_text(size = 36, face = "bold"),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold"),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold"),
          axis.ticks.length = unit(0.4, "cm"),
          axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1.2))
  
  
#Normalized Distribution Plot:
if (assayType == "OFF") {
normalized_dist <- normalized_dist +
  annotate("text", x = 90, y = 110, label = pos_Ctrl, angle = 90, size = 16) +
  annotate("text", x = -15, y = 110, label = neg_Ctrl, color = "black", angle = 90, size = 16) +
  labs(title = NULL, y = "Count", x = "% Decrease in Foci")
 } else {
normalized_dist <- normalized_dist +
  annotate("text", x = 90, y = 1300, label = pos_Ctrl, angle = 90, size = 14) +
  annotate("text", x = -20, y = 1300, label = neg_Ctrl, color = "black", angle = 90, size = 14) +
  labs(title = NULL, y = "Count", x = "% Increase in Foci")
 } 
     
  # Save distribution plots
  ggsave(paste(image_Save_Location, "TdTomatoScreendistrpilot.pdf", sep = ""), 
        normalized_dist, 
        dpi = 300, 
        width = 10, 
        height = 10)
  

  

# ============================================================
# 5. TESTS
# ============================================================
test_row_hit         <- chisq_hit_test(df,"row")
test_col_hit         <- chisq_hit_test(df,"col2")
test_plate_hit       <- chisq_hit_test(df, "Plate")

test_well_recurrence <- well_recurrence_test(df, fold_threshold=well_fold_threshold)

Well recurrence: mean = 2.08 | fold threshold = 3 | flagging wells with >= 6.24 plates
test_col_score_shift <- chisq_score_shift(df, "col2", score_col=score_col)
test_row_score_shift <- chisq_score_shift(df, "row",  score_col=score_col)

sig_rows_hit     <- test_row_hit         %>% filter(flagged) %>% pull(row)      %>% as.character()
sig_cols_hit     <- test_col_hit         %>% filter(flagged) %>% pull(col2)     %>% as.character()
sig_plates_hit   <- test_plate_hit %>% filter(flagged) %>% pull(Plate) %>% as.character()
recurrent_wells  <- test_well_recurrence %>% filter(flagged) %>% pull(well_pos) %>% as.character()
sig_cols_score   <- test_col_score_shift %>% filter(flagged) %>% pull(col2)     %>% as.character()
sig_rows_score   <- test_row_score_shift %>% filter(flagged) %>% pull(row)      %>% as.character()

col_direction <- test_col_score_shift %>% filter(flagged) %>% select(col2, direction) %>% deframe()
row_direction <- test_row_score_shift %>% filter(flagged) %>% select(row,  direction) %>% deframe()

cat("Flagged rows:", length(sig_rows_hit), "| cols:", length(sig_cols_hit),
    "| score-outlier rows:", length(sig_rows_score), "| score-outlier cols:", length(sig_cols_score),
    "| wells:", length(recurrent_wells), "| plates:", length(sig_plates_hit), "\n")
Flagged rows: 3 | cols: 3 | score-outlier rows: 0 | score-outlier cols: 0 | wells: 2 | plates: 0 
# ============================================================
# 6. PLOTS
# ============================================================
lim_val  <- function(x) { v <- max(abs(x), na.rm=TRUE); ifelse(is.finite(v) && v>0, v, 1) }
ylim_row <- c(-1,1) * lim_val(c(row_z$med_z, row_bz$med_bz))
ylim_col <- c(-1,1) * lim_val(c(col_z$med_z, col_bz$med_bz))

p_row_z <- bar_shift(row_z,  "row",  "med_z",   "ZScore: global row shift (median)",  "Row",    "Median ZScore",  ylim=ylim_row)
p_row_h <- bar_shift(row_h,  "row",  "hit_sum", "Hits: global row totals",             "Row",    "Total hits")
p_col_z <- bar_shift(col_z,  "col2", "med_z",   "ZScore: global col shift (median)",  "Column", "Median ZScore",  rotate_x=TRUE, ylim=ylim_col)
p_col_h <- bar_shift(col_h,  "col2", "hit_sum", "Hits: global col totals",             "Column", "Total hits",     rotate_x=TRUE)
if (has_bz) {
  p_row_bz <- bar_shift(row_bz, "row",  "med_bz", "BZScore: global row shift (median)", "Row",    "Median BZScore", ylim=ylim_row)
  p_col_bz <- bar_shift(col_bz, "col2", "med_bz", "BZScore: global col shift (median)", "Column", "Median BZScore", rotate_x=TRUE, ylim=ylim_col)
}

p_heat_z   <- heatmap_metric(grid_sum,"med_z",  "Heatmap: Median Z-Score by Well Position",   "Median Z-Score")  + paper_div_impact_clean() + heatmap_theme_clean + scale_y_discrete(limits=rev)
p_heat_hit <- heatmap_metric(grid_sum,"hit_sum","Heatmap: Total Hits by Well Position",        "Total hits")      + hit_impact_purple_deeper(max(grid_sum$hit_sum,na.rm=TRUE)) + heatmap_theme_clean + scale_y_discrete(limits=rev)
if (has_bz)
  p_heat_bz <- heatmap_metric(grid_sum,"med_bz","Heatmap: Median BZ-Score by Well Position",  "Median BZ-Score") + paper_div_impact_clean() + heatmap_theme_clean + scale_y_discrete(limits=rev)

p_plate_h <- plot_plate_hits(df, sig_plates=sig_plates_hit,
                             title="Hits: global plate totals (significant plates marked *)")
h_rc <- if (has_bz) 12 else 9

row_fig <- {
  if (has_bz) (p_row_z/p_row_bz/p_row_h) + plot_layout(heights=c(1,1,1))
  else        (p_row_z/p_row_h)           + plot_layout(heights=c(1,1))
} + plot_annotation(title="Global Row QC")

col_fig <- {
  if (has_bz) (p_col_z/p_col_bz/p_col_h) + plot_layout(heights=c(1,1,1))
  else        (p_col_z/p_col_h)           + plot_layout(heights=c(1,1))
} + plot_annotation(title="Global Column QC")

heat_fig <- {
  if (has_bz) (p_heat_z/p_heat_bz/p_heat_hit) + plot_layout(heights=c(1,1,1))
  else        (p_heat_z/p_heat_hit)             + plot_layout(heights=c(1,1))
}

save_plot(row_fig,   "QC_ROWS_combined.png",  w=14, h=h_rc)
save_plot(col_fig,   "QC_COLS_combined.png",  w=14, h=h_rc)
save_plot(heat_fig,  "QC_HEAT_combined.png",  w=12, h=if(has_bz) 12 else 9)
save_plot(p_plate_h, "QC_PLATES_hits.png",    w=14, h=7)

# ============================================================
# 7. QC ANNOTATION
# ============================================================
type_string <- function(pl, r, c, wp) {
  out <- character(0)
  if (!is.na(r)  && as.character(r)  %in% sig_rows_hit)
    out <- c(out, "Row enrichment [Chi-sq]")
  if (!is.na(r)  && as.character(r)  %in% sig_rows_score)
    out <- c(out, paste0("Row score ", row_direction[as.character(r)], " [BZScore outlier]"))
  if (!is.na(c)  && as.character(c)  %in% sig_cols_hit)
    out <- c(out, "Col enrichment [Chi-sq]")
  if (!is.na(c)  && as.character(c)  %in% sig_cols_score)
    out <- c(out, paste0("Col score ", col_direction[as.character(c)], " [BZScore outlier]"))
  if (!is.na(wp) && as.character(wp) %in% recurrent_wells)
    out <- c(out, paste0("Well recurrence [>=", well_fold_threshold, "x mean]"))
  if (!is.na(pl) && as.character(pl) %in% sig_plates_hit)
    out <- c(out, "Plate enrichment [Hit]")
  if (length(out)==0) return("None")
  paste(unique(out), collapse="; ")
}

hits_df_qc <- df %>% filter(Hit==1) %>%
  mutate(Type_of_Error    = purrr::pmap_chr(list(Plate,row,col2,well_pos), type_string),
         Systematic_error = ifelse(Type_of_Error=="None","No","Yes"),
         QC_alpha         = alpha_qc,
         QC_well_fold_threshold = well_fold_threshold,
         QC_score_outlier_sd   = score_outlier_sd) %>%
  select(everything(), Systematic_error, Type_of_Error,
         QC_alpha, QC_well_fold_threshold, QC_score_outlier_sd) %>%
  select(-any_of(c("Hit","QC_row_score","QC_col_score","QC_well_score","QC_row_hit","QC_col_hit",
                   "QC_well_hit","QC_score_flag","QC_hit_flag","Systematic_plate_error",
                   "Systematic_error_type","QC_score_metric_used")))

# ============================================================
# 8. EXPORT
# ============================================================
orig_wb <- loadWorkbook(fileX)
if ("Hits_QC" %in% names(orig_wb)) removeWorksheet(orig_wb, "Hits_QC")
addWorksheet(orig_wb, "Hits_QC")
hits_out <- hits_df_qc %>% mutate(across(where(is.factor), as.character))
writeData(orig_wb, "Hits_QC", hits_out)
freezePane(orig_wb, "Hits_QC", firstRow=TRUE)
addFilter(orig_wb,  "Hits_QC", rows=1, cols=1:ncol(hits_out))
saveWorkbook(orig_wb, fileX, overwrite=TRUE)

wb <- createWorkbook()
write_df <- function(s, x) { addWorksheet(wb,s); writeData(wb,s,x) }

write_df("HITS_with_QC_flags",         hits_df_qc)
write_df("TEST_plate_chisq_hit",       test_plate_hit)
write_df("TEST_row_chisq_hit",         test_row_hit)
write_df("TEST_col_chisq_hit",         test_col_hit)
write_df("TEST_col_score_shift",       test_col_score_shift)
write_df("TEST_row_score_shift",       test_row_score_shift)
write_df("TEST_well_recurrence",       test_well_recurrence)
write_df("global_row_medians",  left_join(row_z,row_bz,by="row")  %>% left_join(row_h, by="row"))
write_df("global_col_medians",  left_join(col_z,col_bz,by="col2") %>% left_join(col_h, by="col2"))
write_df("global_grid",         grid_sum)
write_df("plate_row_stats",     plate_row_stats)
write_df("plate_col_stats",     plate_col_stats)

saveWorkbook(wb, file.path(out_dir,"HTS_QC_RESULTS.xlsx"), overwrite=TRUE)
invisible(NULL)

# RDKit imports
rdkit       <- import("rdkit")
Chem        <- rdkit$Chem
AllChem     <- rdkit$Chem$AllChem
DataStructs <- rdkit$DataStructs
Draw        <- import("rdkit.Chem.Draw")
MolDrawing  <- import("rdkit.Chem.Draw.rdMolDraw2D")

# ── Output directory ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
out_dir <- "/Users/dylan/Documents/chemical_screen/results_4_11_26/" 
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)


# ── Molecular Fingerprinting ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fps <- lapply(df_final$SMILES_used, function(smi) {
  mol <- Chem$MolFromSmiles(smi)
  if (is.null(mol)) return(NULL)
  AllChem$GetMorganFingerprintAsBitVect(mol, radius = 2L, nBits = 2048L)
})
valid <- !sapply(fps, is.null)
fps   <- fps[valid]
refs  <- df_final$Reference[valid]


# ── Tanimoto similarity matrix ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
n <- length(fps)
sim_matrix <- matrix(0, n, n, dimnames = list(refs, refs))
for (i in seq_len(n))
  for (j in seq_len(n))
    sim_matrix[i, j] <- DataStructs$TanimotoSimilarity(fps[[i]], fps[[j]])

# ── Palette ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
diverging_owp    <- colorRampPalette(c("#E87D3E", "#F5C9A0", "white", "#9B8EC4", "#3B2A6E"))(100)
sequential_pdark <- colorRampPalette(c("#F5D0D8", "#C98BAA", "#7B3F7A", "#3A1050", "#0F0318"))(100)
bar_fill         <- "darkgray"
umap_colors <- c("NT Ctrl" = "#F4A8B0", "RNF26" = "#F5C89A", "ZNF335" = "#C8B8E0")

# ── Helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
make_legend <- function(ref, hits_df) {
  row <- hits_df %>% filter(Reference == ref)
  paste0(ref, " | Effect:", sprintf("%.1f", row$PercentEffect),
         " | td:", sprintf("%.1f", row$tdTomato_Diff))
}
strip_name <- function(mol) { mol$SetProp("_Name", ""); mol }

opts <- MolDrawing$MolDrawOptions()
opts$legendFontSize <- 22L
opts$legendFraction <- 0.15
opts$padding        <- 0.05

# ── Mol objects ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
mols       <- lapply(df_final$SMILES_used, function(smi) Chem$MolFromSmiles(smi))
valid_mol  <- !sapply(mols, is.null)
mols_valid <- mols[valid_mol]
refs_valid <- df_final$Reference[valid_mol]

#------------------------
#Figure Generation:
#------------------------

# ── IMAGE 1: Heatmap ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#Convert from similarity to distance matrix for heatmap clustering:
tanimoto_dist <- as.dist(1 - sim_matrix)

png(file.path(out_dir, "tanimoto_heatmap.png"), width = 1400, height = 1200, res = 150)
pheatmap(sim_matrix,                        # still display the similarity values
         clustering_distance_rows = tanimoto_dist,
         clustering_distance_cols = tanimoto_dist,
         clustering_method = "ward.D2",
         color = diverging_owp)
dev.off()
null device 
          1 
# ── IMAGE 2: Similarity distribution ──────────────────────────────────────────
sim_vals <- melt(sim_matrix) %>% filter(Var1 != Var2)
p_dist <- ggplot(sim_vals, aes(x = value)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50, fill = bar_fill, color = "white") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.4, linetype = "dashed", color = "#E87D3E") +
  labs(title = "Pairwise Tanimoto Similarity Distribution",
       x = "Tanimoto Similarity", y = "Count") +
  theme_classic()
ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "tanimoto_distribution.png"), p_dist, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 150)

# ── IMAGE 4: UMAP scatter ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
umap_config <- umap.defaults
umap_config$metric      <- "euclidean"   # or use 1-sim_matrix and "precomputed"
umap_config$n_neighbors <- 10            # reasonable for ~50-100 compounds
umap_config$min_dist    <- 0.2
umap_config$random_state <- 42

dist_matrix <- 1 - sim_matrix
umap_res <- umap(dist_matrix, config = umap_config)
umap_df  <- data.frame(UMAP1 = umap_res$layout[, 1], UMAP2 = umap_res$layout[, 2],
                       Reference = rownames(sim_matrix))
p_umap <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, label = Reference)) +
  geom_point(color = bar_fill, size = 2) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "UMAP of Chemical Fingerprint Similarity")
ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "umap_scatter.png"), p_umap, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 150)

# ── IMAGE 5: All hits structure grid ──────────────────────────────────────────
legends_all <- sapply(refs_valid, make_legend, hits_df = df_merged)
mols_clean  <- lapply(mols_valid, strip_name)
img_bytes <- Draw$MolsToGridImage(mols_clean, molsPerRow = 6L, subImgSize = c(600L, 500L),
                                  legends = as.list(unname(legends_all)),
                                  drawOptions = opts, returnPNG = TRUE)
writeBin(as.raw(img_bytes), file.path(out_dir, "hits_structures.png"))

# ── Similarity-based clusters ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
sim_long <- melt(sim_matrix) %>%
  filter(Var1 != Var2, value > 0.4) %>%
  mutate(Var1 = as.character(Var1), Var2 = as.character(Var2))
g     <- graph_from_data_frame(sim_long, directed = FALSE,
                               vertices = data.frame(name = refs_valid))
comps <- components(g)
component_df <- data.frame(Reference = names(comps$membership), Group = comps$membership) %>%
  group_by(Group) %>% filter(n() > 1) %>% ungroup() %>% arrange(Group)
cluster_summary <- component_df %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarize(n = n(), compounds = paste(Reference, collapse = ", "))

# ── IMAGE 6: Grouped structure grid ───────────────────────────────────────────
# ── IMAGE 6: One row per cluster, structures + text separated via magick ───────
library(magick)

groups_unique <- sort(unique(component_df$Group))

cluster_images <- lapply(groups_unique, function(grp) {
  
  # ── Compounds in this cluster ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  refs_in_grp <- component_df$Reference[component_df$Group == grp]
  idx_in_grp  <- match(refs_in_grp, refs_valid)
  valid_idx   <- !is.na(idx_in_grp)
  refs_in_grp <- refs_in_grp[valid_idx]
  idx_in_grp  <- idx_in_grp[valid_idx]
  n_in_grp    <- length(refs_in_grp)
  
  # ── 1. Draw structures with no legend ───────────────────────────────────────
  mols_grp     <- lapply(mols_valid[idx_in_grp], strip_name)
  blank_legs   <- as.list(rep("", n_in_grp))
  
  struct_bytes <- Draw$MolsToGridImage(
    mols_grp,
    molsPerRow  = as.integer(n_in_grp),
    subImgSize  = c(600L, 500L),
    legends     = blank_legs,
    drawOptions = opts,
    returnPNG   = TRUE
  )
  struct_img <- image_read(as.raw(struct_bytes))
  struct_w   <- image_info(struct_img)$width
  cell_w     <- as.integer(struct_w / n_in_grp)
  
  # ── 2. Build text panel for each compound ───────────────────────────────────
  text_panels <- lapply(seq_len(n_in_grp), function(i) {
    ref <- refs_in_grp[i]
    row <- df_merged %>% filter(Reference == ref)
    
    # Pairwise Tanimoto vs every other compound in cluster
    others    <- setdiff(seq_len(n_in_grp), i)
    tan_lines <- sapply(others, function(j) {
      t_val <- DataStructs$TanimotoSimilarity(fps[[idx_in_grp[i]]], fps[[idx_in_grp[j]]])
      sprintf("  vs %s:  %.2f", refs_in_grp[j], t_val)
    })
    
    lines <- c(
      ref,
      sprintf("Eff: %.1f  |  td: %.1f", row$PercentEffect, row$tdTomato_Diff),
      "\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500",
      "Tanimoto:",
      tan_lines
    )
    text_block <- paste(lines, collapse = "\n")
    n_lines    <- length(lines)
    panel_h    <- 30 + n_lines * 28
    
    image_blank(cell_w, panel_h, color = "white") %>%
      image_annotate(
        text     = text_block,
        gravity  = "NorthWest",
        location = "+20+12",
        size     = 22,
        color    = "#222222",
        font     = "DejaVu-Sans"
      )
  })
  
  # ── 3. Stitch text panels side by side ──────────────────────────────────────
  text_row <- image_append(do.call(c, text_panels), stack = FALSE)
  
  # Pad text row to match structure image width if needed
  text_w <- image_info(text_row)$width
  if (text_w < struct_w) {
    text_row <- image_extent(
      text_row,
      geometry = paste0(struct_w, "x", image_info(text_row)$height),
      gravity  = "West",
      color    = "white"
    )
  }
  
  # ── 4. Stack structure image on top of text row ──────────────────────────────
  image_append(c(struct_img, text_row), stack = TRUE)
})

# ── Add cluster banners and stack all rows vertically ────────────────────────
max_width <- max(sapply(cluster_images, function(img) image_info(img)$width))

final_rows <- lapply(seq_along(cluster_images), function(i) {
  grp <- groups_unique[i]
  n   <- sum(component_df$Group == grp)
  img <- cluster_images[[i]]
  
  # Pad to uniform width
  if (image_info(img)$width < max_width) {
    img <- image_extent(
      img,
      geometry = paste0(max_width, "x", image_info(img)$height),
      gravity  = "West",
      color    = "white"
    )
  }
  
  # Cluster label banner
  banner <- image_blank(max_width, 50, color = "#EDE9F5") %>%
    image_annotate(
      text     = sprintf("Cluster %d  (%d compounds)", grp, n),
      gravity  = "West",
      location = "+16+0",
      size     = 26,
      color    = "#3B2A6E",
      font     = "DejaVu-Sans",
      weight   = 700
    )
  
  image_append(c(banner, img), stack = TRUE)
})

final_img <- image_append(do.call(c, final_rows), stack = TRUE)
image_write(final_img, file.path(out_dir, "hits_structures_grouped.png"))
message("Saved: hits_structures_grouped.png")

# ── EXCEL EXPORT ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
wb <- createWorkbook()

header_style    <- createStyle(fontName = "Arial", fontSize = 11, fontColour = "white",
                               fgFill = "#3B2A6E", halign = "center",
                               textDecoration = "bold", border = "Bottom")
cell_style      <- createStyle(fontName = "Arial", fontSize = 10, numFmt = "0.0000",
                               halign = "center", border = "LeftRight", borderColour = "#CCCCCC")
cell_style_text <- createStyle(fontName = "Arial", fontSize = 10, halign = "left")
cell_style_num  <- createStyle(fontName = "Arial", fontSize = 10, numFmt = "0.0000", halign = "right")
cell_style_int  <- createStyle(fontName = "Arial", fontSize = 10, numFmt = "0", halign = "center")

# ── Sheet 1: Tanimoto Similarity Matrix ───────────────────────────────────────
addWorksheet(wb, "Tanimoto Similarity")
sim_df <- cbind(Reference = rownames(sim_matrix), as.data.frame(sim_matrix))
rownames(sim_df) <- NULL
writeData(wb, "Tanimoto Similarity", sim_df, startRow = 1, startCol = 1,
          headerStyle = header_style, borders = "surrounding")
n_rows <- nrow(sim_df); n_cols <- ncol(sim_df)
conditionalFormatting(wb, "Tanimoto Similarity", cols = 2:n_cols, rows = 2:(n_rows + 1),
                      style = c("#FFFFFF", "#7B3F7A"), rule = c(0, 1), type = "colourScale")
addStyle(wb, "Tanimoto Similarity", style = cell_style,
         rows = 2:(n_rows + 1), cols = 2:n_cols, gridExpand = TRUE)
addStyle(wb, "Tanimoto Similarity", style = cell_style_text,
         rows = 2:(n_rows + 1), cols = 1, gridExpand = TRUE)
setColWidths(wb, "Tanimoto Similarity", cols = 1,
             widths = max(nchar(as.character(sim_df$Reference))) * 1.2 + 2)
setColWidths(wb, "Tanimoto Similarity", cols = 2:n_cols, widths = 10)
freezePane(wb, "Tanimoto Similarity", firstRow = TRUE, firstCol = TRUE)

# ── Sheet 2: UMAP Results ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
addWorksheet(wb, "UMAP Results")
writeData(wb, "UMAP Results", umap_df, startRow = 1, startCol = 1,
          headerStyle = header_style, borders = "surrounding")
n_umap_rows <- nrow(umap_df)
addStyle(wb, "UMAP Results", style = cell_style_text,
         rows = 2:(n_umap_rows + 1), cols = 1, gridExpand = TRUE)
addStyle(wb, "UMAP Results", style = cell_style_num,
         rows = 2:(n_umap_rows + 1), cols = 2:3, gridExpand = TRUE)
setColWidths(wb, "UMAP Results", cols = 1, widths = 25)
setColWidths(wb, "UMAP Results", cols = 2:3, widths = 14)
freezePane(wb, "UMAP Results", firstRow = TRUE, firstCol = FALSE)

# ── Sheet 3: Cluster Assignments ───────────────────────────────────────────────
addWorksheet(wb, "Clusters")
cluster_export <- component_df %>%
  left_join(df_merged %>% select(Reference, PercentEffect, tdTomato_Diff), by = "Reference") %>%
  arrange(Group, Reference)
cluster_export$Group <- as.integer(cluster_export$Group)
writeData(wb, "Clusters", cluster_export, startRow = 1, startCol = 1,
          headerStyle = header_style, borders = "surrounding")
n_cluster_rows <- nrow(cluster_export)
addStyle(wb, "Clusters", style = cell_style_text,
         rows = 2:(n_cluster_rows + 1), cols = 1, gridExpand = TRUE)
addStyle(wb, "Clusters", style = cell_style_int,
         rows = 2:(n_cluster_rows + 1), cols = 2, gridExpand = TRUE)
addStyle(wb, "Clusters", style = cell_style_num,
         rows = 2:(n_cluster_rows + 1), cols = 3:4, gridExpand = TRUE)



# Alternating row shading by cluster group
groups <- cluster_export$Group
for (i in seq_len(n_cluster_rows)) {
  if (groups[i] %% 2 == 0)
    addStyle(wb, "Clusters", rows = i + 1, cols = 1:4, gridExpand = TRUE, stack = TRUE,
             style = createStyle(fgFill = "#EDE9F5", fontName = "Arial", fontSize = 10))
}

writeData(wb, "Clusters", cluster_summary, startRow = 1, startCol = 6,
          headerStyle = header_style, borders = "surrounding")
setColWidths(wb, "Clusters", cols = 1,   widths = 25)
setColWidths(wb, "Clusters", cols = 2,   widths = 10)
setColWidths(wb, "Clusters", cols = 3:4, widths = 16)
setColWidths(wb, "Clusters", cols = 6:8, widths = c(10, 8, 40))
freezePane(wb, "Clusters", firstRow = TRUE)

# ── Save workbook ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
saveWorkbook(wb, file.path(out_dir, "cheminformatics_results.xlsx"), overwrite = TRUE)

message("Export complete:")
message("  Images: tanimoto_heatmap.png, tanimoto_distribution.png, pca_scatter.png,")
message("umap_scatter.png, hits_structures.png, hits_structures_grouped.png")
message("  Excel:  cheminformatics_results.xlsx (3 sheets: Tanimoto Similarity, UMAP Results, Clusters)")
